title: Popsicle Pack
description:
(only works with pojav launcher)

Elevate your Minecraft journey with our Pojav Launcher modpack. VulkanMod transforms visuals, replacing OpenGL with Vulkan API, while client-side features enhance convenience.
body:
Requirements:
Android 12 or higher,
Vulkan 1.1 or higher


Embark on a Minecraft journey like never before with our tailored modpack for the Pojav Launcher. Experience a visual revolution as VulkanMod takes the reins, seamlessly replacing OpenGL with the powerful Vulkan API, enhancing graphics and performance. But our modpack is more than just a visual upgrade – it introduces a suite of client-side quality of life features, refining your gameplay with streamlined interfaces and user-friendly enhancements. Immerse yourself in the perfect blend of innovation and convenience, as VulkanMod and client-side improvements redefine the core of your blocky adventure. Elevate your Minecraft experience with our exclusive modpack designed for the Pojav Launcher.
